title: Smart Tip Assistant: Calculate with Confidence
subtitle: Stop guessing. Get fair, context-aware tip suggestions based on service quality and local standards.
heroDescription: Tipping shouldn't be a source of stress. Whether you're at a restaurant or ordering a delivery, our smart assistant helps you calculate the perfect tip based on your actual experience.

benefits.title: Service-Based Logic
benefits.description: Adjust your tip based on wait times, staff attitude, and overall experience.

benefits.title: Fairness First
benefits.description: Get recommendations that respect local norms while reflecting your personal satisfaction.

benefits.title: Instant Results
benefits.description: One-click calculation that includes the bill split for your entire party.

faq.question: Why use an assistant for tips?
faq.answer: It removes the mental math and awkwardness, ensuring you're fair to service workers without overpaying.

faq.question: Does this work in any country?
faq.answer: The logic is designed to be adaptable, helping you calculate based on the standard percentages for your specific location.
